title: thelypteris viscosa
intro: Thelypteris viscosa, also known as the sticky fern or tropical polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Thelypteris viscosa include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, Thelypteris viscosa is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or poultices, which can be used to apply its medicinal properties topically or internally to alleviate various health issues.
